basic.description:
{Basic Navigation}

Basic Navigation increases the hero's movement over water by 50% and allows boarding and disembarking without ending the turn, granting 100 movement points upon landing.

advanced.description:
{Advanced Navigation}

Advanced Navigation increases the hero's movement over water by 100% and allows boarding and disembarking without ending the turn, granting 300 movement points upon landing.

expert.description:
{Expert Navigation}

Expert Navigation increases the hero's movement over water by 150% and allows boarding and disembarking without ending the turn, granting 600 movement points upon landing.
